findings.message:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract ExchangeContract (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#177-261) has payable functions:
	 - ExchangeContract.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#209-241)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
findings.name: locked-ether

findings.message: Wallet.getExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#370-376) ignores return value by OracleContract(oracleContract).readRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#375)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message: Wallet.requestExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#378-380) ignores return value by OracleContract(oracleContract).requestRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#379)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message:
Wallet.changeOwnership(address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#440-442) should emit an event for: 
	- owner = newOwner (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#441)
findings.name: events-access

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#435-438) should emit an event for: 
	- exchangeFee = newExchangeFee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#437)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateMaximumRateDelay(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#428-433) should emit an event for: 
	- maximumRateDelay = newMaximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#432)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeAddress(address).newExchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#424) lacks a zero-check on :
		- exchangeContract = newExchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#425)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Wallet.updateOracleAddress(address).newOracle (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#420) lacks a zero-check on :
		- oracleContract = newOracle (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#421)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Wallet.changeOwnership(address).newOwner (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#440) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = newOwner (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#441)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Wallet.externalTransfer(uint256,address).to (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#304) lacks a zero-check on :
		- address(to).transfer(amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#307)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
OracleContract.answerRequest(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#75-111) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(r.active,Request inactive) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#77)
	- require(bool,string)(bytes(r.currency).length != 0,Invalid request) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#78)
	- require(bool,string)(! r.answers[msg.sender],Already answered) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#89)
	- r.requestTime < exchangeRateTime[r.currency] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#91)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
ExchangeContract.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#209-241) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - rateTime <= maximumRateDelay,Outdated rate) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#228-231)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message: Function ExchangeContract._updateBridge(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#243-245) is not in mixedCase
findings.name: naming-convention

findings.name: naming-convention

findings.message: Function OracleContract._addOracle(string,string,string,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#123-141) is not in mixedCase
findings.name: naming-convention

findings.message: Function ExchangeContract._addCurrency(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#247-250) is not in mixedCase
findings.name: naming-convention

findings.name: immutable-states

findings.name: immutable-states
